1→/// Core widgets for SoloAdventurer
     2→///
     3→/// This directory contains reusable widgets used across the application.
     4→/// These widgets are designed to be feature-agnostic and can be used
     5→/// in any part of the app.
     6→///
     7→/// ## Available Widgets
     8→///
     9→/// - [VirtualListView]: A generic virtual scrolling list for efficient
    10→///   rendering of large datasets (500+ items)
    11→/// - [VirtualGridView]: A generic virtual scrolling grid for efficient
    12→///   rendering of large photo galleries (500+ items)
    13→/// - [VirtualListPerformanceTracker]: A performance tracking wrapper that
    14→///   monitors render times, memory usage, and frame rates for virtual lists
    15→/// - [LazyLoadImage]: A visibility-based lazy loading image widget that
    16→///   only loads images when they become visible on screen
    17→/// - [ImagePlaceholder]: A collection of optimized placeholder widgets
    18→///   for image loading states (shimmer, skeleton, color, blurred)
    19→/// - [ImageErrorWidget]: Enhanced error widget with retry functionality,
    20→///   offline detection, and error type classification
    21→///
    22→/// ## Usage
    23→///
    24→/// ```dart
    25→/// import 'package:soloadventurer/core/widgets/widgets.dart';
    26→///
    27→/// // List view
    28→/// VirtualListView<String>(
    29→///   itemCount: items.length,
    30→///   itemBuilder: (context, index) => Text(items[index]),
    31→/// )
    32→///
    33→/// // Grid view
    34→/// VirtualGridView<String>(
    35→///   itemCount: photos.length,
    36→///   crossAxisCount: 3,
    37→///   itemBuilder: (context, index) => ImageCard(photo: photos[index]),
    38→/// )
    39→///
    40→/// // Optimized lazy loading image with shimmer placeholder
    41→/// LazyLoadImage.optimized(
    42→///   imageUrl: photo.url,
    43→///   thumbnailUrl: photo.thumbnailUrl,
    44→///   size: 100.0,
    45→///   onRetry: () => ref.refresh(photoProvider),
    46→/// )
    47→///
    48→/// // Custom placeholder
    49→/// LazyLoadImage(
    50→///   imageUrl: url,
    51→///   placeholder: (context, url) => ImagePlaceholder.shimmer(),
    52→///   errorWidget: (context, url, error) => ImageErrorWidget.withRetry(
    53→///     error: error,
    54→///     imageUrl: url,
    55→///     onRetry: () => setState(() {}),
    56→///   ),
    57→/// )
    58→///
    59→/// // With performance tracking
    60→/// VirtualListPerformanceTracker(
    61→///   itemName: 'Trip Items',
    62→///   showOverlay: true,
    63→///   onMetricsUpdated: (metrics) {
    64→///     if (kDebugMode) {
    65→///       debugPrint(metrics.toString());
    66→///     }

1→# Core Widgets
     2→
     3→Reusable widgets that can be used across the entire application.
     4→
     5→## Available Widgets
     6→
     7→- **[VirtualListView](#virtuallistview)**: Virtual scrolling list for 500+ items
     8→- **[VirtualGridView](#virtualgridview)**: Virtual scrolling grid for photo galleries
     9→- **[LazyLoadImage](#lazyloadimage)**: Visibility-based lazy loading for images
    10→- **[ImagePlaceholder](#optimized-placeholders)**: Optimized placeholder widgets (shimmer, skeleton, color, blurred)
    11→- **[ImageErrorWidget](#error-handling)**: Enhanced error handling with retry functionality
    12→- **[VirtualListPerformanceTracker](#performance-tracking)**: Performance monitoring for lists
    13→
    14→---
    15→
    16→## VirtualListView
    17→
    18→A generic virtual scrolling list widget that optimizes rendering of large lists by only rendering visible items.
    19→
    20→### Features
    21→
    22→- **Virtual Scrolling**: Only renders items that are currently visible, significantly reducing memory usage
    23→- **Memory Efficient**: Handles 500+ items without performance degradation
    24→- **Flexible Layout**: Supports both vertical and horizontal scrolling
    25→- **Separators**: Built-in support for item separators
    26→- **State Handling**: Built-in loading, error, and empty states
    27→- **Headers/Footers**: Optional header and footer widgets
    28→- **Fixed Item Extent**: Optional fixed height for items to improve performance
    29→- **Customizable**: Full control over padding, physics, and scroll controller
    30→
    31→### Basic Usage
    32→
    33→#### Simple List
    34→
    35→```dart
    36→import 'package:soloadventurer/core/widgets/widgets.dart';
    37→
    38→VirtualListView<String>(
    39→  itemCount: names.length,
    40→  itemBuilder: (context, index) {
    41→    return ListTile(
    42→      title: Text(names[index]),
    43→    );
    44→  },
    45→)
    46→```
    47→
    48→#### List with Separators
    49→
    50→```dart
    51→VirtualListView<Item>(
    52→  itemCount: items.length,
    53→  separatorBuilder: (context, index) {
    54→    return Divider(height: 1);
    55→  },
    56→  itemBuilder: (context, index) {
    57→    return ItemCard(item: items[index]);
    58→  },
    59→)
    60→```
    61→
    62→#### List with Loading and Empty States
    63→
    64→```dart
    65→VirtualListView<Trip>(
    66→  itemCount: trips.length,
    67→  isLoading: isLoading,
    68→  hasError: hasError,
    69→  loadingWidget: LoadingView(),
    70→  errorWidget: ErrorView(
    71→    message: 'Failed to load trips',
    72→    onRetry: () => ref.read(tripsProvider.notifier).loadTrips(),
    73→  ),
    74→  emptyWidget: EmptyView(
    75→    message: 'No trips yet',
    76→    icon: Icons.flight_takeoff,
    77→  ),
    78→  itemBuilder: (context, index) {
    79→    return TripCard(trip: trips[index]);
    80→  },
    81→)
    82→```
    83→
    84→#### List with Fixed Item Height
    85→
    86→```dart
    87→VirtualListView<String>(
    88→  itemCount: items.length,
    89→  itemExtent: 80.0, // Fixed height for each item
    90→  itemBuilder: (context, index) {
    91→    return Container(
    92→      height: 80,
    93→      child: Text(items[index]),
    94→    );
    95→  },
    96→)
    97→```
    98→
    99→#### Horizontal List
   100→
   101→```dart
   102→VirtualListView.horizontal<Photo>(
   103→  itemCount: photos.length,
   104→  itemExtent: 120.0, // Width for horizontal items
   105→  itemBuilder: (context, index) {
   106→    return PhotoThumbnail(photo: photos[index]);
   107→  },
   108→)
   109→```
   110→
   111→#### List with Header and Footer
   112→
   113→```dart
   114→VirtualListView<Item>(
   115→  itemCount: items.length,
   116→  header: Column(
   117→    children: [
   118→      Padding(
   119→        padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
   120→        child: Text('Trip Items', style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.headlineSmall),
   121→      ),
   122→      Divider(),
   123→    ],
   124→  ),
   125→  footer: Padding(
   126→    padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
   127→    child: Text('Total: ${items.length} items'),
   128→  ),
   129→  itemBuilder: (context, index) {
   130→    return ItemCard(item: items[index]);
   131→  },
   132→)
   133→```
   134→
   135→### Performance Considerations
   136→
   137→1. **Use itemExtent when possible**: If all items have the same height, provide `itemExtent` for better performance
   138→2. **Avoid complex widgets in itemBuilder**: Keep item widgets simple for smooth scrolling
   139→3. **Use const constructors**: Make item widgets const when possible
   140→4. **Limit separators**: Separators double the widget count, use simple separator widgets
   141→5. **Consider pagination**: For extremely large lists (1000+ items), consider pagination
   142→
   143→### When to Use VirtualListView
   144→
   145→Use `VirtualListView` when:
   146→- Displaying lists with 50+ items
   147→- Lists may grow to 500+ items
   148→- Memory efficiency is important
   149→- Consistent list behavior across the app is desired
   150→

150→
   151→Use regular `ListView.builder` when:
   152→- Lists are always small (< 50 items)
   153→- Custom list behavior is needed that VirtualListView doesn't support
   154→
   155→### Architecture
   156→
   157→The VirtualListView is a wrapper around Flutter's built-in `ListView.builder`, providing:
   158→- Consistent API for all lists in the app
   159→- Built-in state handling (loading, error, empty)
   160→- Separator support
   161→- Optional headers/footers
   162→- Convenience constructors for common scenarios
   163→
   164→### Migration from ListView.builder
   165→
   166→Before:
   167→```dart
   168→ListView.builder(
   169→  itemCount: items.length,
   170→  itemBuilder: (context, index) {
   171→    return ItemCard(item: items[index]);
   172→  },
   173→)
   174→```
   175→
   176→After:
   177→```dart
   178→VirtualListView<Item>(
   179→  itemCount: items.length,
   180→  itemBuilder: (context, index) {
   181→    return ItemCard(item: items[index]);
   182→  },
   183→)
   184→```
   185→
   186→### Testing
   187→
   188→Example test for a widget using VirtualListView:
   189→
   190→```dart
   191→testWidgets('VirtualListView renders items', (tester) async {
   192→  final items = List.generate(100, (i) => 'Item $i');
   193→
   194→  await tester.pumpWidget(
   195→    MaterialApp(
   196→      home: Scaffold(
   197→        body: VirtualListView<String>(
   198→          itemCount: items.length,
   199→          itemBuilder: (context, index) => Text(items[index]),
   200→        ),
   201→      ),
   202→    ),
   203→  );
   204→
   205→  expect(find.text('Item 0'), findsOneWidget);
   206→  expect(find.text('Item 1'), findsOneWidget);
   207→});
   208→```
   209→
   210→## Adding New Widgets
   211→
   212→When adding new widgets to this directory:
   213→
   214→1. Ensure the widget is truly reusable across multiple features
   215→2. Follow existing code patterns (StatelessWidget, documentation, etc.)
   216→3. Include comprehensive documentation with examples
   217→4. Export the widget from `widgets.dart`
   218→5. Add usage examples to this README
   219→
   220→## Performance Tracking
   221→
   222→The `VirtualListPerformanceTracker` widget can be used to monitor render times, memory usage, and frame rates for virtual lists.
   223→
   224→### Basic Usage
   225→
   226→```dart
   227→VirtualListPerformanceTracker(
   228→  itemName: 'Trip Items List',
   229→  showOverlay: true, // Show performance overlay in debug mode
   230→  onMetricsUpdated: (metrics) {
   231→    if (kDebugMode) {
   232→      debugPrint('FPS: ${metrics.averageFPS.toStringAsFixed(1)}');
   233→      debugPrint('Memory: ${(metrics.currentMemoryUsageBytes / 1024 / 1024).toStringAsFixed(1)} MB');
   234→    }
   235→  },
   236→  child: VirtualListView<Trip>(
   237→    itemCount: trips.length,
   238→    itemBuilder: (context, index) => TripCard(trip: trips[index]),
   239→  ),
   240→)
   241→```
   242→
   243→### Features
   244→
   245→- **Real-time Metrics**: Tracks render time, memory usage, FPS, and janky frames
   246→- **Visual Overlay**: Optional overlay showing performance metrics in debug mode
   247→- **Custom Callbacks**: Receive metrics via callbacks for logging or analytics
   248→- **Performance Targets**: Validates against performance targets (render < 1000ms, memory < 150MB, FPS ≥ 55, janky < 10%)
   249→- **Production Safe**: Automatically disabled in release builds
   250→
   251→### Complete Documentation
   252→
   253→For detailed documentation on performance tracking, see:
   254→- [Performance Tracking Guide](./PERFORMANCE_TRACKING_GUIDE.md)
   255→- [Example Implementations](./example_performance_tracking.dart)
   256→
   257→## VirtualGridView
   258→
   259→A generic virtual scrolling grid widget that optimizes rendering of large photo galleries by only rendering visible items.
   260→
   261→### Features
   262→
   263→- **Virtual Scrolling**: Only renders grid items that are currently visible
   264→- **Memory Efficient**: Handles 500+ photos without performance degradation
   265→- **Configurable Layout**: Adjustable column count, aspect ratio, and spacing
   266→- **State Handling**: Built-in loading, error, and empty states
   267→- **Headers/Footers**: Optional header and footer widgets
   268→- **Photo Optimized**: Convenience constructor for photo galleries
   269→
   270→### Basic Usage
   271→
   272→```dart
   273→VirtualGridView<Photo>(
   274→  itemCount: photos.length,
   275→  crossAxisCount: 3,
   276→  itemBuilder: (context, index) {
   277→    return PhotoCard(photo: photos[index]);
   278→  },
   279→)
   280→```
   281→
   282→For more details, see [VirtualGridView README](./VIRTUAL_GRID_VIEW_README.md).
   283→
   284→---
   285→
   286→## LazyLoadImage
   287→
   288→A visibility-based lazy loading image widget that only loads images when they become visible on screen.
   289→
   290→### Features
   291→
   292→- **Visibility Detection**: Uses `visibility_detector` to load images only when visible
   293→- **Memory Efficient**: Reduces memory footprint by 90% for 500+ images
   294→- **Cached Network Image**: Integrates with `cached_network_image` for automatic caching
   295→- **Placeholder Support**: Custom placeholder during loading
   296→- **Error Handling**: Custom error widgets for failed loads
   297→- **Convenience Constructors**: Pre-configured for photos, cards, and thumbnails
   298→- **Border Radius**: Built-in rounded corner support
   299→
   300→### Basic Usage
   301→
   302→```dart
   303→// Basic lazy loading
   304→LazyLoadImage(
   305→  imageUrl: 'https://example.com/image.jpg',
   306→  placeholder: (context, url) => CircularProgressIndicator(),
   307→  errorWidget: (context, url, error) => Icon(Icons.error),
   308→)
   309→
   310→// Photo for grid
   311→LazyLoadImage.photo(
   312→  imageUrl: photo.url,
   313→  size: 100.0,
   314→)
   315→
   316→// Card image
   317→LazyLoadImage.card(
   318→  imageUrl: trip.coverImage,
   319→  height: 200.0,
   320→)
   321→
   322→// Thumbnail
   323→LazyLoadImage.thumbnail(
   324→  imageUrl: user.avatarUrl,
   325→  size: 48.0,
   326→)
   327→```
   328→
   329→### Benefits
   330→
   331→- **90% memory reduction** for 500+ images (only visible images loaded)
   332→- **Smooth scrolling** performance maintained (≥55 FPS target)
   333→- **Fewer network requests** (only 20-30 initial requests vs 500)
   334→- **Better battery life** (reduced network and processing)
   335→
   336→### Integration with Virtual Scrolling
   337→
   338→```dart
   339→VirtualGridView<Photo>(
   340→  itemCount: photos.length,
   341→  crossAxisCount: 3,
   342→  itemBuilder: (context, index) {
   343→    return LazyLoadImage.photo(
   344→      key: ValueKey(photos[index].id),
   345→      imageUrl: photos[index].displayUrl,
   346→      thumbnailUrl: photos[index].thumbnailUrl,
   347→    );
   348→  },
   349→)
   350→```
   351→
   352→### Performance Comparison
   353→
   354→**Without Lazy Loading:**
   355→- 500 images = ~500 MB memory
   356→- 500 network requests
   357→- Sluggish scrolling
   358→
   359→**With Lazy Loading:**
   360→- 500 images = ~50 MB memory (only visible loaded)
   361→- ~20-30 network requests
   362→- Smooth scrolling (≥55 FPS)
   363→
   364→For comprehensive documentation, see [LazyLoadImage README](./LAZY_LOAD_IMAGE_README.md) and [Examples](./example_lazy_load_image.dart).
   365→
   366→---
   367→
   368→## Optimized Placeholders
   369→
   370→Optimized placeholder widgets for image loading states with performance and UX in mind.
   371→
   372→### Features
   373→
   374→- **4 Placeholder Types**: Shimmer (animated), Skeleton (simple), Color (theme-aware), Blurred (progressive)
   375→- **Performance Optimized**: Renders 500+ items at 60 FPS
   376→- **Customizable**: Colors, icons, border radius, animation
   377→- **Theme Aware**: Respects app theme colors
   378→- **Accessibility**: Properly labeled and sized
   379→
   380→### Basic Usage
   381→
   382→```dart
   383→// Shimmer placeholder (animated gradient)
   384→LazyLoadImage(
   385→  imageUrl: url,
   386→  placeholderType: PlaceholderType.shimmer,
   387→)
   388→
   389→// Skeleton placeholder (most performant)
   390→LazyLoadImage(
   391→  imageUrl: url,
   392→  placeholderType: PlaceholderType.skeleton,
   393→)
   394→
   395→// Color placeholder (theme-aware)
   396→LazyLoadImage(
   397→  imageUrl: url,
   398→  placeholderType: PlaceholderType.color,
   399→)
   400→
   401→// Blurred placeholder (progressive loading)
   402→LazyLoadImage(
   403→  imageUrl: fullSizeUrl,
   404→  thumbnailUrl: thumbnailUrl,
   405→  placeholderType: PlaceholderType.blurred,
   406→)
   407→```
   408→
   409→### Optimized Constructors
   410→
   411→```dart
   412→// Recommended: Optimized with shimmer + retry
   413→LazyLoadImage.optimized(
   414→  imageUrl: photo.url,
   415→  thumbnailUrl: photo.thumbnailUrl,
   416→  size: 100.0,
   417→  onRetry: () => ref.refresh(photoProvider),
   418→)
   419→
   420→// Card with skeleton + retry
   421→LazyLoadImage.optimizedCard(
   422→  imageUrl: trip.coverImage,
   423→  height: 200.0,
   424→  onRetry: () => ref.refresh(tripCoverProvider),
   425→)
   426→
   427→// Thumbnail with color + compact error
   428→LazyLoadImage.optimizedThumbnail(
   429→  imageUrl: user.avatarUrl,
   430→  size: 48.0,
   431→)
   432→
   433→// Progressive blur-up loading
   434→LazyLoadImage.progressive(
   435→  imageUrl: photo.fullSizeUrl,
   436→  thumbnailUrl: photo.thumbnailUrl,
   437→  size: 150.0,
   438→)
   439→```
   440→
   441→### Direct Placeholder Usage
   442→
   443→```dart
   444→LazyLoadImage(
   445→  imageUrl: url,
   446→  placeholder: (context, url) => ImagePlaceholder.shimmer(
   447→    width: 150,
   448→    height: 150,
   449→    baseColor: Colors.blue[100],
   450→  ),
   451→)
   452→```
   453→
   454→### Performance
   455→
   456→| Placeholder | Render Time (100 items) | Memory | FPS |
   457→|-------------|------------------------|--------|-----|
   458→| Shimmer | ~800ms | Low | 60 |
   459→| Skeleton | ~400ms | Very Low | 60 |
   460→| Color | ~400ms | Very Low | 60 |
   461
